emails.subject: Hi there
emails.body: Hi there Was wondering if you'd like a ride home this evening. Also, if Janie would like one she's more than welcome to join.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: RE: Hi there I would love a ride. What time To: South, Steven P.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: you tell me...you're the one that is actually working these days. Would you mind mentioning it to Janie as well...I'd hate to not offer? To: Scott, Susan M.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: how about 4:30 Janie is out at 4:00 To: South, Steven P.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: that's fine...i can meet you by the elevators for the parking garage To: Scott, Susan M.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: do you have msn mess service To: South, Steven P.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: yes...the email address is susan_m_scott@hotmail.com To: Scott, Susan M.

emails.subject: RE: Hi there
emails.body: thats not working call me x36798 To: South, Steven P.
